programme.title: Curious George: Monkey Hoedown/ Curious George Clowns Around
programme.desc: When George accidentally ruins the Man with the Yellow Hat's guitar, he and Allie decide to make a new one. When George and the Man with the Yellow Hat visit the Clown College to see Pepe El Loco's Big Show, George gets mistaken for a messenger clown.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: To Touch a Hummingbird
programme.desc: Martin and Chris realise the hummingbird might be the ultimate flier.

programme.title: Hero Elementary: Sound of Ice Cream/ The Reflection Connection
programme.desc: When an ice cream truck is accidentally made invisible, Sparks' Crew has to rely on the sound of the truck's music to track and find it.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: King Run/ The Native Youth Olympics
programme.desc: Molly and Tooey must help Grandpa Nat fix the broken fish wheel, but have a bigger problem when it goes missing. Then, Molly wants to put a team together to win a gold medal for the Native Youth Olympics.

programme.desc: Our heroes meet someone incredible, who had to overcome a lot to learn how to do just about anything: Helen Keller; Brad takes his friends to meet someone who worked his whole life to help people be heard: Alexander Graham Bell.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Bob the Plant/ Aren't We a Pair?
programme.desc: Leo's plant 'Bob' is sick, and Leo must find out what's wrong to save him.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel's Bicycle/ Katerina's Magic Trick
programme.desc: Dad Tiger gives Daniel his old bicycle, and Daniel is eager to ride it.

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog: The Wild Wolf Pack: Putt-ing It Together
programme.desc: A lovable, oversized canine, Clifford, emphasizes good citizenship and community.

programme.title: Sesame Street: The Big Pretend Band
programme.desc: Bert learns how to pretend to play a saxophone so he can be in a pretend band.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Peterrific/ Mother's Day Surprise
programme.desc: Peter builds the tallest block tower ever, all the way to the moon and has so much fun that he doesn't want to come down; Pinkalicious and Peter want to do something extra special for Mother's Day.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: The Final
programme.desc: Find out who will be crowned the winner after they wrestle with meringues, undertake a British classic with only one recipe instruction and no measurements, and tackle one of the most complex challenges ever seen on the series.

programme.title: The White House: Inside Story
programme.desc: Gain access to America's most iconic residence, a symbol of history and an icon of democracy. From the Oval Office to the family dining room, through national crises and world wars, the 200-year story of the White House is the story of America itself.

programme.title: The Lawrence Welk Show: County Fair

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Nest Swap/ The Herd Is the Word
programme.desc: The Pteranodon Family decides to take a little vacation and swaps nests with a family of pterosaurs.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: Amazing Eyes/ Water Walkers
programme.desc: Sally and Nick work to find a wild guinea pig while learning about different ways to see things.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Folly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Girls Disappeared

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Producer's Backend
programme.desc: Amaro reports to the scene of a car crash where a Hollywood starlet tries to flirt her way out of an arrest. Amaro tries to investigate the starlet for statutory rape, but Benson believes there is an underlying issue.

programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers
programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: The Office: The Job
programme.desc: The office is still buzzing from the events of their day at the beach. A job opening in Corporate pits coworker against coworker as Michael, Jim and Karen all head to New York for final interviews.

programme.title: The Office: The Job
programme.desc: The office is still buzzing from the events of their day at the beach. A job opening in Corporate pits coworker against coworker as Michael, Jim and Karen all head to New York for final interviews.

programme.title: The Office: Fun Run
programme.desc: A freak accident causes Michael to believe the office is cursed. He explores the religious beliefs of his employees before deciding to hold a charity fun run. Meanwhile, developments in the romances of Pam and Jim, and Dwight and Angela are explored.

programme.title: The Office: Fun Run
programme.desc: A freak accident causes Michael to believe the office is cursed. He explores the religious beliefs of his employees before deciding to hold a charity fun run. Meanwhile, developments in the romances of Pam and Jim, and Dwight and Angela are explored.

programme.title: The Office: Dunder-Mifflin Infinity
programme.desc: Much to the dismay of Michael and many of the employees, Ryan returns to the Scranton branch of Dunder Mifflin to bring the company into the digital age.

programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Local Ad
programme.desc: Michael jumps at the chance to display his creativity in an upcoming Dunder Mifflin ad. Meanwhile, Dwight explores the online world of Second Life.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: Whale Whores

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: The actions of a renegade gamer threaten to destroy Blizzard Entertainment's World of Warcraft. The fate of the game now lies in the hands of Cartman and the gang who dedicate their lives to defeating the mad gamer and saving the World of Warcraft.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Sucks

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi-Def Jam
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon will stop at nothing to watch the Super Bowl on HDTV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Paint Misbehavin
programme.desc: Deacon has a paintball birthday party; Carrie tells Doug she finds Deacon attractive.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Deacon Blues
programme.desc: Doug is surprised to find his married best friend, Deacon, out with another woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Horizontal Hold
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug ban sex for two weeks, forcing them to resolve their conflicts verbally.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inner Tube
programme.desc: Doug's guilty conscience leads to a spoof in which he appears on a number of TV shows.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Papa Pill
programme.desc: Doug takes his turn as Arthur's caretaker and finds it a challenging and difficult task.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Package Deal
programme.desc: Doug quits his job to work for a competitor and Carrie develops a tanning cream addiction.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie have different opinions about Deacon and Kelly's recent separation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Departure Time
programme.desc: When Doug goes to meet his parents at the airport, they ask him to sign their living will.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Swim Neighbors
programme.desc: Carrie plunges into a lawsuit with the neighbours who have built a swimming pool.

programme.title: The King of Queens: S'no Job
programme.desc: Doug helps his cousin Danny get a job at IPS; Arthur joins a film focus group.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pregnant Pause
programme.desc: An evening of romance between Carrie and Doug results in a totally unexpected surprise.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pregnant Pause
programme.desc: An evening of romance between Carrie and Doug results in a totally unexpected surprise.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Walk, Man
programme.desc: In order to spend more time with Carrie, Doug hires Spence's dog walker to walk Arthur.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sight Gag
programme.desc: Doug gives Carrie laser eye surgery for her birthday, but she is left temporarily blinded.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mean Streak
programme.desc: Doug is about to break the record for the highest number of consecutive deliveries.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Friender Bender
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's friendship with Victor and Kelly is tested after Doug hits their car.

programme.title: The King of Queens: No Retreat
programme.desc: Doug goes with Carrie on her company retreat while Arthur is left to fend for himself.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: Launching the Manhunt for the Golden State Killer
programme.desc: The terrifying true story of one of the nation's most prolific uncaught serial killers. Known first as the East Area Rapist, then the Original Night Stalker, and now the Golden State Killer, he's responsible for at least 51 attacks and 12 murders.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: The Pattern of a Killer
programme.desc: Find out how a criminal gets away with 51 attacks and 12 murders while assaulting people inside their own homes. Delve into the sadistic methods of one of the worst serial killers in America, the Golden State Killer.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: How the Killer Got Away
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer wreaked havoc in California and changed many American laws. Everything from rape crisis centres to 911 emergency services and DNA collection laws were influenced by this one criminal.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: Insider the Killer's Mind
programme.desc: When dealing with a serial killer it's not only the crime scenes that are revealing, it's also the serial behaviours that offer clues to the offender's identity.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: Golden State Killer Theories
programme.desc: Investigators analyze the evidence and explore the various theories as to who they thought this ruthless barbarian could be.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: Closing in on the Golden State Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Texan Torture
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfer and an Ex-Military member take on the Texan countryside with armadillo, big horn sheep and wild boar. Their skills are tested as they battle starvation and a dangerous flood.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rain of Terror
programme.desc: A mother and an adventure addict enter the cloud forest of Ecuador and encounter unbearably wet conditions, lightning, cabin fever, trench foot and finger-slicing machetes during their 21-day challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A self-taught survivalist and an impulsive black belt take on the arid lakebeds of Nicaragua. The environment features a variety of deadly predators, but when one of them fails to pull their weight, it becomes clear their worst enemy could be each other.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Boiling Point
programme.desc: The islanders are three weeks in to their challenge and struggling to survive. The group has gone seven days without a real meal, and tensions over money are high. Morag's frustration boils over, and Jack and Ben take on Marco in a race for cash.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Sunstroke of Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. Two survivalists Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian island for 21 days. The surfer girl and the former Marine clash when sunstroke and starvation threaten their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Boiling Point
programme.desc: The islanders are three weeks in to their challenge and struggling to survive. The group has gone seven days without a real meal, and tensions over money are high. Morag's frustration boils over, and Jack and Ben take on Marco in a race for cash.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Surviving Starvation and Inner Struggles
programme.desc: Mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. Two survivalists Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian island for three weeks. The surfer girl and the former Marine clash when sunstroke and starvation threaten their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shaky Ground
programme.desc: With just three days to preserve the legacy of a fourth generation Alaskan homesteading family, the Raneys must fix an earthquake-ravaged foundation and revive a dormant garden before hitting the lower 48 for another year of incredible rescues.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: The Jackson family in Idaho suffers from a cabin on the verge of collapse and a predator threat for 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin livable, protect the flock and create a valuable income source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out
programme.desc: In Northern California, the Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of the Olson-Wilcox family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake Shattered
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Hog Heaven and Homestead Hell
programme.desc: The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Marty must move a cabin onto a flood-proof foundation. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs, and Misty crafts a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout

programme.title: Storage Wars: Crickets and Wickets
programme.desc: In West Covina, Rene brings Gunther along for moral support but gets annoyed when he won't take sides. Darrell stumbles over what may be a diamond in the rough. Brandi and Jarrod discover a different national pastime.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Man in Black is Back
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked to see Dave Hester return to the auctions with a vengeance, but even the Mogul can't stop the buyers from scoring great units in Huntington Beach. Also, Darrell tries to get Brandon in 'tip-top' shape, and Ivy must change up his game.

programme.title: Storage Wars: One Girl's Trinket Is Another Man's Treasure
programme.desc: Back in Adelanto, Ivy records a hefty find. Brandi and Jarrod test the waters and it pays off big. Mary cranks up her profit to the sweet sound of success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tour de Chance
programme.desc: The girls have a newlywed-themed surprise for Emily. Rene reels in a huge locker, while Darrell tests his bicycle knowledge and wins.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Kumba-YUUUP!
programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away, leaving them only scraps; Kenny uses Mary as a Dave shield, and the two find their way to a decent unit of their own.

programme.title: Storage Wars: 666: The Sign of the Profit
programme.desc: Not even the 'cupped hands' of San Bernardino can save Mary's fortune, but Ivy manages to scrap together a bit of coin, while Kenny finds all the magic.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bunny Owns This Town
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi are determined not to let Dave distract them from a good score, while Darrell wants to find out more about the elusive Mogul. Dave shows up with even more bluster, and Ivy uncovers a treasure that promises adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bowling for Brandi
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon are excited to return to West Covina as it is a hidden honeypot for the duo. While it's off the beaten path, Jarrod and Brandi decide to follow Darrell's lead into the Inland Empire. Plus, Ivy searches for low level merchandise.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the King of Montebello
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi split up, and only time will tell if it's for good. Ivy has hired a new employee to run his shop. Darrell's Montebello magic strikes again, and Rene learns the art of stripping.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Wet the Sheets?
programme.desc: Ivy tries to hit a high pay-off with a low buy-in, while Darrell and Brandon limp into a locker that may leave them all wet.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The French Job
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find some toys, and Jarrod tries to battle a world champion.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hooray for Holly-Weird
programme.desc: The buyers are in North Hollywood, CA during the grand re-opening of Jarrod and Brandi's store.

programme.title: Storage Wars: This Lamp's for You
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find a vintage lamp that comes from royalty ... of sorts. Darrel Sheets spends the most money ever spent on a unit in 'Storage Wars' history.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Get Him to the Mayan
programme.desc: The buyers go south to Laguna Nigel, California to try their luck.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Mission Hills brings new challenges as Ivy changes his game and goes for a locker with collectables. Mary just tries to land something that will give her a quick sale.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Not Your Average Bear
programme.desc: The buyers make a pilgrimage to the desert of Lancaster, Calif. West-side heavy-hitter Nabila Haniss makes the trek and is richly rewarded. Dave Hester brings the fifth wheel and ends up feeling like one.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: The buyers negotiate the desert winds of Lancaster, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Darrell Sheets the Bed

programme.title: Storage Wars: Boom Goes the Dynamite?
programme.desc: The buyers head to Rene's territory in hopes of schooling him on his own turf.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Punished
programme.desc: The guys pose as cranky NY cab drivers, then solicit undeserved congrats in the park. Then, tonight's loser is sheriff of an old Nevada town.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6

programme.title: House: Birthmarks
programme.desc: House receives word that his father has passed away and initially dismisses the idea of going to the funeral. While en route, House must work with the team via phone to help diagnose a woman who collapsed while searching for her birth parents in China.

programme.title: House: Lucky Thirteen
programme.desc: A woman falls ill and has a seizure at Thirteen's apartment after a night of partying. The team takes on the case and House jumps on the opportunity to delve into Thirteen's personal life.

programme.title: House: Joy
programme.desc: The team treats a sleepwalking patient experiencing unexplained blackouts. Meanwhile, House finds out Cuddy is going to adopt a baby that is due in two weeks. When Cuddy meets the mother and notices a strange rash on her arm, House treats her.

programme.title: House: The Itch
programme.desc: When an agoraphobic man falls mysteriously ill and adamantly refuses to leave his home to seek treatment, House and the team go to him to figure out what might be wrong.

programme.title: House: Emancipation
programme.desc: The team tackles the case of a 16-year-old factory manager and emancipated minor who falls ill at work. Meanwhile, Foreman takes on his own paediatric case and is left questioning his ability to work without House's oversight.

programme.title: House: Last Resort
programme.desc: A man willing to kill for a diagnosis takes House, Thirteen and several patients hostage in Cuddy's office. House is determined to end the standoff the only way he knows how: by coming up with the right diagnosis.

programme.title: House: Let Them Eat Cake
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of a high-profile fitness trainer who collapses while shooting an infomercial. Meanwhile, Thirteen begins her participation in a clinical drug trial for Huntington's disease.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress
programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Boil and Trouble
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and Daphne Oz cast spells to beat Bobby Flay and Jeffrey Hansell and Meghann Ward try to scare Bobby in his own kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Cracking a Win
programme.desc: French chef David Baruthio and North Carolinian Blake Hartwick arrive at the arena. Anne Burrell and Andrew Zimmerman decide who will face Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pulling Out All the Stops
programme.desc: Actor Steve Schirripa and the toughest judge on Food Network, Simon Majumdar, have their sights set on beating Bobby. Boston chef Dave Bazirgan sharpens his knives to take on "Mr. Downtown," Stephen Jones, for the ultimate chance to cook against Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: I Thought We Were Friends!
programme.desc: Scott Conant and Giada De Laurentiis become Bobby's sworn enemies as they pick the chef to take him down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Tame the Flame
programme.desc: Chopped judge Scott Conant and actress Busy Phillips have their sights set on beating Bobby Flay! They pit Toronto chef Ivana Raca against New Orleans chef Tom Wolfe, with both chefs fighting to make their mark.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Inside Scoop
programme.desc: Actress Helene Yorke and Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli conspire to beat Bobby Flay. They bring in southern boy Bobby Hansen and the Midwest's Steven Oakley, two chefs who are vying to take down the east coast king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Grill Fits the Bill
programme.desc: Food Network's Marc Murphy and Chef Anne Burrell want to rake Bobby Flay over the coals. They'll have help from two grill masters, Chef David Bancroft and BBQ champion Susie Bulloch, as they show no chill trying to grill Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Shucking the Competition
programme.desc: French chefs Laurent Zirotti and Eric Damidot go head to head in the arena.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Top 5 Transformations Countdown
programme.desc: Robert Irvine counts down the biggest restaurant transformations in Restaurant: Impossible history.

programme.title: Undercover Chef: Getting Naughty at NautiFish
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Mark Estee heads to Missouri to meet with the owner of NautiFish, a lakeside restaurant that is struggling to stay afloat. Mark sets up hidden cameras to reveal the shockingly naughty truth behind this restaurant's failure to thrive.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Knighted Sir Loin
programme.desc: Sonoma County chef Tracey Shepos Cenami and Jersey-strong John Vitale fight for the right to battle greatness. If they want to beat Bobby Flay, however, they'll have to impress the sophisticated palates of Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Voltaggio.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Feeling Bleu
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli and Bobby Moynihan team up and beating Bobby is no joking matter. They bring in Marcellus Coleman and Lionel Haeberle to slay the Flay.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brain Freeze

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Sea of Misery
programme.desc: It's week three of the Opilio Crab Season, and the long hours and miserable conditions already have the crabbers turning on each other and boat-crushing ice stands between one skipper and the safety of harbour.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Lockout
programme.desc: After weeks of battling freezing spray, forty-foot waves, and sub-zero temperatures, skippers begin plugging their boats with Opilio crab. But as they race to St. Paul harbour for offload, a 250,000 square mile arctic ice pack stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Slap in the Face or a Kick in the Butt
programme.desc: Halfway through the season, each skipper faces a personal form of hell. Frozen crab, frozen gear and a frozen harbour chill the hearts of the most callous fishermen. On the Northwestern, Sig battles a fierce cigarette addiction and a fierce storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: When the fleet gets word of great fishing by the ice pack, the chase is on to the ends of the earth. However a journey to the far north push these men over the edge.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bitter Tears
programme.desc: Weeks into the Opilio's season, the fleet is bone tired and desperate for home. As delirium sets in, deadly rib-crunching mistakes are made and for one fisherman, a tragedy on land spells gut-wrenching heartbreak at sea.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: The Opilio season is almost over, but an arctic storm front has the skippers on edge. The boats race to plug their tanks with crabs and get back to port unscathed but on the first boat to finish, a tight-knit crew fractures.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Shipwrecked
programme.desc: It's the final 24 hours of the 2009 Opilio crab season and a savage arctic storm causes multiple vessels to send out maydays. The Coast Guard is in a race against the clock to save four men before their boat is pounded into splinters against jagged rocks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: No Second Chances
programme.desc: The fleet arrives on the Opi Grounds, but they struggle to hunt down crab while facing ice, big seas, and bad information. A skipper regrets sending his men out in savage weather to save his boat, but there are no second chances on the Bering Sea.

programme.desc: Kiki's brother, Darnell, returns to the shop. When he disappears, Kiki is shocked when she finds out that Darnell has been shot. Meanwhile, Malik and Alex find a way around the 'no date' rule by having a date in Malik's backyard.

programme.title: House of Payne: A Grand Payne
programme.desc: Janine's parents, Liz and Larry, come to visit to see the new twins and, as usual, they clash with everyone. Meanwhile, Malik and Alex have a date at the Hernandez house that's chaperoned by the only two available, Calvin and Mercedes.

programme.desc: When Martin's CD Walkman disappears, he accuses all of his good friends of taking it.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill
programme.desc: After winning a charity boxing match, Martin thinks he is as good a fighter as anyone. After Tommy Hearns makes advances towards Gina, Martin challenges the boxer to a 10-round grudge match.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Plot With a View
programme.desc: Nikki buys a burial plot for herself and Professor Oglevee from a shady undertaker.

programme.title: The Parkers: Mama, I'm Baaack
programme.desc: Kim surprises everyone when she returns home from Harvard but Nikki has rented her room.

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger
programme.desc: Dre has never had a problem with Pops dating, but when it comes to Ruby, he won't let anyone come between them. When Ruby invites Dre and Bow to meet the new man in her life, Dre immediately goes on the defensive and finds any reason to dislike him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Keeping Up With the Johnsons
programme.desc: After a month of heavy spending, Dre and Bow start to question if they are living too large and try to become more financially responsible.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: After Dre notices that his neighbour Janine has never invited his family to any of her pool parties, he assumes she is racially stereotyping them as a family that doesn't swim. The kids are shocked to find out that, in fact, Dre doesn’t know how to swim.

programme.title: Black-ish: Twindependence
programme.desc: Jack and Diane are tired of being twins, and after much pleading, Dre and Bow give in to letting them explore their lives as individuals. Meanwhile, Dre buys Zoey her first car, and she is over the moon.

programme.title: Black-ish: Hope
programme.desc: When the kids ask some tough questions in the midst of a highly publicized court case involving alleged police brutality and an African-American teenager, Dre and Bow are conflicted on how best to field them.

programme.title: Black-ish: Any Given Saturday
programme.desc: Jack and Diane are doing biography projects about each other in school, and Diane decides to shoot a documentary on Jack's budding basketball career.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Nanny
programme.desc: Dre and Bow start to slip on the kids' activities and chores around the house, so Bow persuades Dre to hire a nanny. After several interviews that don't go well, they meet Vivian, who impresses them with her desire to take care of the whole family.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Leftovers
programme.desc: When Dre and Bow realize they don't have a legal guardian for their kids, they make it their mission to find replacement parents should anything happen to them. Meanwhile, Zoey and Junior reveal the truth to Jack about their old dog's death.

programme.title: Black-ish: Johnson & Johnson

programme.title: Home Town: Stay Awhile: Restored Glory
programme.desc: Ben and Erin's approach to home renovations begins and ends with history. From uncovering historic wallpaper to incorporating a homeowner's personal story, the duo looks back at some of their favorite history moments of the first three seasons.

programme.title: Home Town: Stay Awhile: Sit a Spell
programme.desc: Southern living can often be encapsulated with one word -- porch -- a space Ben and Erin believe is just as important as the living room. The duo takes a look back at some of their favourite porch renovations.

programme.desc: We celebrate the transformation of Laurel, Mississippi and announce the town selected for Home Town Takeover. Ben and Erin share stories of locals that helped revitalize Laurel as they prepare to help another town on the journey to revitalization.

programme.title: Home Town: A Town to Call Home

programme.title: Home Town: Porch Dreams
programme.desc: Amanda is returning to Mississippi after seven years of living in San Antonio, Texas, and she's looking for a historic home with a front porch and room for entertaining for $150,000.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Bigger Kitchen for a Growing Family
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs overhaul an expecting couple's outdated, 1970s home into a space that feels welcoming for their growing family.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern
programme.desc: A family that owns a local brewery purchased an older home rich with history, but the outdated rooms and obsolete features create many challenges. Dave and Jenny add creative and personal touches like a custom, handmade beer tap.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Marrying the Old and the New
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan overhaul an entry, living room, dining room and kitchen, leaving the family with a home they can love for years to come.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Family Home Refresh
programme.desc: A couple that bought their home when they were newlyweds are frustrated by the dated kitchen, total lack of storage and closed-off main floor. Jonathan and Drew overhaul the spaces to create a fresh, modern home that will work for years to come.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Starter House to Dream Home
programme.desc: Over the years, a couple's home has become the family hub for holidays and celebrations, but the closed-off layout cramps their entertaining and everyday style. Drew and Jonathan tackle a major renovation to turn this starter home into their dream space.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Change the House, Not the School

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: The New Hub of the Neighborhood

programme.title: The Dead Files: The Cursed Path - Roseburg, Oregon
programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate a Roseburg, Oregon woman's startling claims of violent paranormal activity.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: I Dream of Jeanne

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Yellowstone's Alien Omen
programme.desc: When an unexplained fire of blue flames breaks out near Yellowstone, experts suspect it could be a portent of something deadly. Using cutting-edge tech, scientists investigate if these alien lights mean Yellowstone's super volcano is waking up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street
programme.desc: A railroad bridge on the edge of disaster, a nightmare in a fairy-tale town, and a massive cathedral in calamity are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Hell Tower, NYC
programme.desc: A New York City skyscraper that could topple at any moment, a city street that suddenly collapses, and a modern-day crisis at Pisa's Leaning Tower.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: Investigating a skyscraper raining deadly bolts on the streets below, a highway on the brink of collapse, and a catastrophic landslide.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions and how cutting-edge tech pushes cinematic carnage to new heights.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Black Powder Blast
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War, and using cutting-edge technology, they experiment with this simple yet deadly explosive.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: How It's Made: Handcrafted Skis, Septic Tanks, Hydroformed Chassis Parts, Aquarium Windows
programme.desc: This episode features handcrafted skis, septic tanks, hydroformed chassis parts and aquarium windows.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fish Replicas, Siren Systems, Pre-packaged Sandwiches, Candlesticks
programme.desc: Find out the secrets behind fish replicas, siren systems, pre-packaged sandwiches and candlesticks.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sum of Love
programme.desc: A friendship between a math teacher and assistant principal turns into a connection far deeper. But when a possessive estranged husband threatens their relationship and their safety, the pair take drastic measures to protect themselves against him.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A teen girl with big ambitions of becoming a cop falls hard for the charm of an NYPD officer. He promises to make all her dreams come true but when affairs of the heart are complicated by the letter of the law.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Therapy on Ice
programme.desc: When violin prodigy Lia Tricomo seeks the help of therapist John Alkins, they connect over a shared love of music. When John finds it impossible to resist his troubled patient, the consequences of indulging his forbidden passion will prove deadly.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Online Secrets
programme.desc: In 2014, the scorched remains of a house fire reveal two female victims, a 17 year old girl named Mani and her mother Robin. When investigators dig deeper into the women's lives, they uncover a secret online relationship that led to tragedy.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: A Miami Murder Mystery
programme.desc: In a real Miami murder mystery, detectives are looking for anyone who had a grudge against a high-flying businessman. They cast a wide net, but as they dig deeper into his private life, they uncover a dark secret with fatal consequences.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Who Killed Katie Autry?
programme.desc: The community of Bowling Green, Kentucky is devastated when a student is assaulted and burned in her college dorm room. After the victim succumbs to her injuries without naming her attacker, police find two suspects with very different stories.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Online Secrets
programme.desc: In 2014, the scorched remains of a house fire reveal two female victims, a 17 year old girl named Mani and her mother Robin. When investigators dig deeper into the women's lives, they uncover a secret online relationship that led to tragedy.

programme.desc: In a real Miami murder mystery, detectives are looking for anyone who had a grudge against a high-flying businessman. They cast a wide net, but as they dig deeper into his private life, they uncover a dark secret with fatal consequences.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Who Killed Katie Autry?
programme.desc: The community of Bowling Green, Kentucky is devastated when a student is assaulted and burned in her college dorm room. After the victim succumbs to her injuries without naming her attacker, police find two suspects with very different stories.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Thanksgiving Day Charade
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, police officers are sent out on a welfare check and uncover an unthinkable triple homicide. To unmask the killer, detectives must uncover a victim's secrets and examine a hidden world of disinheritance, rage, and dark accusations.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Brothers In Arms
programme.desc: In Queens, NYPD detectives discover a bullet-pierced body stuffed into the trunk of a car and quickly find themselves drawn into a dark tale of brotherhood, backstabbing, and betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline: Vengeance
programme.desc: A woman accuses her boyfriend of raping her and then finds herself on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Empty Chair
programme.desc: The day after a snowstorm, high school freshman Shaun Ouillette vanishes. His mother searches for three desperate weeks. But when an anonymous letter leads detectives into the frozen woods, they make a discovery that will tear the small town apart.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Widows of Winter
programme.desc: 74-year-old widow Virginia Johannessen is shot dead in her home; then, another widow is murdered on the same street. Is someone targeting widows on Felton Road? As police unravel the truth, they discover they've made a chilling mistake.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: 40 Years of Winter
programme.desc: After Christmas shopping, 18-year-old Linda Velzy vanishes into upstate New York's frozen landscape. The primary suspect refuses to talk to detectives, so Linda's father hatches a desperate plan. But temperatures are dropping and time is running out.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Winter Blaze
programme.desc: After a house fire lights up a Wisconsin night, firefighters find the bodies of a woman and two kids, with evidence they'd been bound before the blaze. Police learn the victim's infant son is missing and must scramble to find the deadly kidnappers.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Bitter Blade
programme.desc: When a beautiful home healthcare worker disappears during an icy New York night, loved ones lead the search for her safe return. But a series of incoming text messages and a mysterious missed call reveal a soul-crushing truth and a murder most evil.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Season's Grievings
programme.desc: After a night at karaoke, a pretty nurse vanishes into the frigid Wisconsin winter. Security footage reveals the woman left with a mystery man in a dark jacket. What detectives uncover is the coldest of crimes and a monstrous end to a beautiful life.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: A Winter's Grave
programme.desc: During an icy Wisconsin winter, a single mom vanishes. Police learn she was recently stalked by two men at a bar, but the danger doesn't stop there. A brutal assault, an anonymous email and a bizarre confession shed light on a deadly encounter.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Cold Heart
programme.desc: On a snowy Wisconsin morning, an 18-year-old mother is found beaten, stabbed and strangled to death with her 3 month old son as her only witness. Leads soon grow cold and the chase for a suspect leads detectives to a vicious killer who's close to home.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Raid on the Reactor
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the government of Israel is releasing top secret documents detailing the secret plans, strategies and implementation of their raid on the Iraqi nuclear facility in 1981, one of the most daring and successful military strikes ever.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Brothels
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions: brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities. Underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time and have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: Deep Sea UFO Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting our oceans.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: They say everything's bigger in Texas, and the pools are no exception. The Pool Kings are facing a big backyard and even bigger expectations from their interior design client.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountaintop Luxury Lagoon
programme.desc: The Leasure family's new house in the hills above Folsom, CA, comes with breathtaking lakeside views, and their big pool dreams will make it a perfect home. But rocky soil and tricky plumbing designs create a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tuscan Wonderwall
programme.desc: The Pool Kings are faced with a dilapidated 1980s-style pool and a family that wants a beautiful yard where they can cook outside. They rip out the old pool and build a Tuscan beauty with multiple overflows and glass detail work.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Stuccoed to Sell
programme.desc: A couple with too little time to invest in lawn care doesn't think their house will sell in its current state. Chris and Sara rescue their property from dying plants and a mismatched exterior by adding fresh paint, a patio and a stone path.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Texas Transformation in Port Aransas
programme.desc: A woman and her kids have been vacationing in Port Aransas, TX, for years and are ready to own a piece of their favorite paradise.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Bring It on in Brigantine, NJ
programme.desc: After spending many summer days vacationing on the Jersey Shore, a couple is ready to buy a getaway of their own in Brigantine, NJ.

programme.desc: Giada DeLaurentiis, Duff and Sandra Lee talk about what sugar-packed treats they love.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Mighty Meatless

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seafood Sampler

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beach Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe goes surfside for a coastal fairground adventure. He'll sample creative beach eats from midway vendors all around the country.

programme.desc: A successful lawyer finds himself the target of a treacherous National Security Agency official after receiving evidence to a politically motivated murder. The only man that can help him is a former government operative turned surveillance expert.

programme.title: Perry Mason: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Mason is left incensed by a jaw-dropping admission from Baggerly and, after pressing Emily on her husband's alibi, finds himself confronted by an outraged Della. Beat cop Paul Drake is rerouted to a gruesome crime scene and finds a trail of evidence.

programme.title: I May Destroy You: That Was Fun
programme.desc: Back in London and two months after the incident, Arabella meets with a therapist who encourages her to find relaxing and creative ways to cope with her trauma.

programme.title: Movie: The Gunman
