programme.desc: Michael and Dwight are out of the office for the day as Michael tries to close a deal on a new condo for himself. Meanwhile, Jim and Pam organize an "Office Olympics" where the staff members compete in ridiculous games.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: The Job
programme.desc: The office is still buzzing from the events of their day at the beach. A job opening in Corporate pits coworker against coworker as Michael, Jim and Karen all head to New York for final interviews.

programme.title: The Office: The Job

programme.title: The Office: Did I Stutter?

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.desc: A single mother takes her son to an amusement park where he gets abducted. She goes to the police, but realizes that she doesn't have the time to wait for their help. Taking her son's safety into her own hands, she pursues the abductor relentlessly.

programme.title: Movie: Homeless to Harvard: The Liz Murray Story

programme.title: Movie: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: Chronicling the lives and friendships of six women in Louisiana.

programme.title: Movie: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A newborn is abducted from a New York hospital and eventually solves her own case and is reunited with her biological parents 23 years later.

programme.title: Movie: Fab Five: The Texas Cheerleader Scandal
programme.desc: Five popular high school cheerleaders disregard the school rules and exhibit scandalous behaviour. When the new cheerleading coach tries to discipline them, she is asked to resign.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: Closing in on the Golden State Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Hear from those who knew him and the investigators who spent a lifetime tracking him down.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredge Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground. Kris battles bad attitudes. One dredge pushes too far into the storm, forcing its crew to abandon ship.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dive Hard With a Vengeance
programme.desc: After the raging storm, Ken learns the Myrtle Irene's fate. Shawn uses a new tool to hunt for new hotspots. Emily brings on a new crew member from her past. Vernon tries his luck at river mining. Kris gambles on an alliance to turn his season around.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Gold Is Thicker Than Blood

programme.desc: For Independence Day, the Kellys travel back to Northern California for an explosive adventure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Robot Cowboy

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Twins House
programme.desc: Scott partners with a pair of crazy identical twins to flip a filthy house in an upscale suburb.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Country Club House
programme.desc: Scott and his team makeover neglected homes, creating happy new homeowners and neighbours.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Home Made Presents: Skate House
programme.desc: Scott buys a house that has previously been used as a hangout by local punks, but renovations move slowly as the kids revisit to vandalize the house.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Complex Duplex
programme.desc: Justin and Ashlee are ready for the challenge of flipping a home that Duke and Keith don't think is salvageable. Lacking contractors and dealing with a squatter, the pair needs Duke and Keith's help to complete this tricky home makeover.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Clinical Disaster
programme.desc: This lakefront home has a horrible layout with a long, ugly residential wing designed like a live-in rehab clinic. Ashlee takes the lead on this big flip, but her grandiose designs threaten to blow the budget wide open.

programme.title: Movie: Wanted
programme.desc: A man who is bored with his life discovers that a secret organization of assassins wants to recruit him.

programme.title: Movie: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When Jack Reacher returns to his old headquarters, he discovers he is being charged with a crime committed nearly 20 years ago. He travels across the country to make things right. His mission is to clear his name and that of his unit's new leader.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 11
programme.desc: Twenty more inventions including a way to make pooping in the woods even more exciting, a way to cool your man parts for optimal baby making, and a sound system for the great beyond.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 12
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the smartest inventions ever to hit the market. There's a flask for your butt, a way to re-shape meat, and the last doughnut security system you'll ever need.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 13
programme.desc: These inventions could put Thomas Edison to shame, from a bird feeder with a shocking high-voltage surprise, to a bowl made entirely of bacon and a wacky way to grow bananas at home.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Schooled by the Sauce
programme.desc: Two teachers get schooled by the fiery inferno of hot sauce, while a rapper and his manager sweat was they try to beat the heat.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes
programme.desc: In this special episode, Michael gives a fresh look to your favourite tricks with never-before-seen footage. From the arcade to the science lab, Michael revisits classic moments with footage from the cutting room floor.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Two
programme.desc: In this special, a trip down memory lane turns trippy when Michael revisits classic bits, including the hallucinogenic frog and the glue-sniffing mishap, to unlock never-before-seen reactions to your favorite jaw-dropping tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Three
programme.desc: In this special, Michael revisits some of the spookiest bits of Carbonaro past to reveal fresh frights with never-before-seen reactions to tricks, including the alien abduction, musical ghosts and mad science experiments gone wrong.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Back in Time
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael revisits a spirits-drinking spirit, a living fossil, rewrites history again and more with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reboots a living skeleton, an instant pet trap, a flipping mermaid and more, all with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Meet and Greet
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: Find out how many laser nipples one man can stand and who the sexy fireman who 'rescues' Sal from the bathroom of horrors really is.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Taunted House
programme.desc: The guys get extra cheesy at a pizza parlor, and then head to Wall Street where they ask strangers to help translate bizarre text messages in Spanish. Then, trapped in a haunted house, a nightmare comes to life for tonight's big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Good, the Bad, and the Punished
programme.desc: One Joker committed a misdemeanor while posing as a crabby cabbie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Pranksters 3
programme.desc: Counting down the 20 dumbest pranksters on the planet including: phones glued to faces, fake pregnancies, and the ultimate April fool.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Pranksters 4
programme.desc: Tricks include everything from a terrifying wake up call, to telekinesis and a not-so-dead body in the trunk of a taxi.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the most talent less performers yet. Performances include a man in a toast topping to a death scene that takes too long to die.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.desc: A teenager collapses during her high school Christmas program. The team learns the troubled teen dealt with bullying at school and as her condition continues to deteriorate, the team must delve deeper to get to the bottom of her mysterious illness.

programme.title: House: Painless
programme.desc: House treats a patient whose chronic pain pushes him to the edge. Meanwhile, Cuddy finds that taking care of her newly adopted baby leaves her little time to run a hospital.

programme.title: House: Big Baby
programme.desc: In an effort to free up more time to spend at home with her newly adopted baby, Cuddy passes some of her day-to-day responsibilities off to Cameron -- including supervising House. A power struggle erupts while evaluating a too-good-to-be-true teacher.

programme.title: House: The Greater Good
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of a woman who collapsed in the middle of a cooking class. They soon learn she is a highly renowned cancer researcher who recently gave up her entire career in order to pursue her own personal happiness.

programme.title: House: Unfaithful
programme.desc: A priest who runs a homeless shelter is admitted to the ER after seeing a bleeding Jesus hovering at his doorstep. House takes on the case as a distraction for the team while he confronts Foreman and Thirteen about their relationship.

programme.title: House: The Softer Side
programme.desc: The team encounters a teenage boy who collapsed from severe pelvic pain after playing basketball. When tests reveal the boy has genetic mosaicism (both male and female DNA), the boy's parents inform House that the boy is unaware of his condition.

programme.title: House: The Social Contract
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of Nick, a book editor who loses his inhibitions and starts insulting coworkers at a dinner party before falling ill. Meanwhile, House grows suspicious after catching Wilson and Taub in a lie.

programme.title: House: Here Kitty
programme.desc: Nursing-home worker Morgan fakes a seizure to get House's attention after a cat sleeps next to her. It seems that the cat only pays a visit to people if they are about to die, and does so with alarming accuracy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From North To South America
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into flavours that span the Americas. In Charlotte, N.C., he visits a brewery serving the bomb bacon jam burger and a dynamite duck confit flatbread. In Cancun, Mexico, a lights-out spot takes street tacos to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: And the Kicker Is
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a restaurant in Columbia with homemade patties, a corner store in Buffalo serving everything with a side of homemade bread and a diner that's redefining scrapple in Berkeley.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brunch, Bologna and Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing everything from brunch to burgers! In Louisville, Ky., a breakfast-lunch spot crankin' out southern comfort, like lamb grits and fried bologna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Goes Hawaiian
programme.desc: Guy checks out the hot spots in Hawaii for food and visits an authentic luau.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Chowfest
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's filling up on winner winner chicken dinners. In Baltimore, the local landmark dishes out wicked wings alongside a steak wrap. In Eugene, Oregon, a soul food joint has BBQ chicken on top of their signature burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Made to Order
programme.desc: Guy discovers an Italian joint doing lobster ravioli with homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Whole Lotta Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into hearty helpings of comfort starting with a soul food spot dishing out Southern seafood and killer fried chicken in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Knockouts
programme.desc: Guy's traveling up and down the west coast in search of funky neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wings, Dogs and Claws
programme.desc: Guy checks out the best homemade cooking in the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Bacon And Bbq
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., a funky farm-to-table spot piles up a pimento cheeseburger and homemade brats. In Napa, Calif., an amazing Asian joint cooks up kimchi fried rice and pork ramen. In San Antonio, Texas, Guy stops for some bomb barbecue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Bites
programme.desc: Guy's rolling up to some joints pulling out all the stops. In New York's East Village, the neighbourhood spot plating up a standout burger is worthy of a four star review.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's driving the Camaro all over the nation for some real deal eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Joints
programme.desc: Guy heads out to Minnesota to a cafeteria for some family cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pied to Fried
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's travelling the nation and digging into all kinds of killer grub. In St. Petersburg, Florida, a lights-out spot is loading up the righteous ramen, and a New Orleans smokehouse puts out Big Easy favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Found 'Em
programme.desc: Guy goes to a drive-in in Kentucky that's serving the same burgers as they did in 1951.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Food Classics
programme.desc: Guy visits Charlotte and Rhode Island in search of home made comfort foods.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Stacked, Stuffed and Loaded
programme.desc: Guy heads out to find some serious fast food. He visits a burger joint in Rhode Island that has more than 20 burgers on its menu. Then, Guy heads to California for some barbequed pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Their Own Way
programme.desc: Guy meets cooks doing things their own way in Flagstaff Arizona.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: In the Family
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out a Baltimore diner that's famous for their pit beef with Duff Goldman.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Rings and Fries
programme.desc: Guy Fieri uncovers the best places to buy the All American meal: burgers and fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seaside Eats
programme.desc: Menu includes: fried clams; crab cakes; lobster chow mein.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri chases down some of the best of America's signature dish at three burger joints.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's nephew is coming in for a visit and is ready to chow down on a home-cooked barbecue meal. They have a great time catching up and chilling out with an old-fashioned menu that includes bacon BBQ nachos.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Outdoor Movie Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes some of her favorite munchies for an outdoor movie night on the farm. Her Nachos are piled high with BBQ Pulled Pork, and Radishes with Smoked Butter are a unique, crunchy combination. She assembles individual Candy Bar Salads for dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 7
programme.desc: Ree cooks for the 4th of July with store-bought shortcuts and lots of fun with her family crew. She makes party-ready chipotle Caesar salad with grilled salmon, a fabulous cheesy asparagus tart and easy corn dip that's a real crowd pleaser.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fourth Of July
programme.desc: Hundreds of guests are invited to the ranch, and Ree's keeping it effortless and easy.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Family Style: Can You Grill It?
programme.desc: The hosts pull out unexpected and flavourful foods to cook on the grill all summer long. Sunny starts with a grilled open-faced BLT and Geoffrey follows with grilled potatoes with chipotle yogurt. Then, Jeff makes a charred caprese salad.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Recipes on Repeat
programme.desc: Giada makes four summertime recipes that are on repeat in her home. Her Insalata Di Riso, mixed 'caprese,' easy pantry chicken and chocolate peanut butter cookie sandwiches are a home run every time.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Ina Garten showcases incredible desserts, including a decadent chocolate cake with mocha frosting, sophisticated prunes in armagnac and a crazy-delicious salted caramel sundae with peanut-caramel popcorn and rich chocolate sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Favorites With a Twist
programme.desc: Guy visits places with a new take on old favourites such as a huge caramel pecan roll.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Guy experiences the unusual off the grill, such as a Thai twist on classic Texas bbq.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Something Different
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a West Virginia joint built from old transportation buses.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All San Diego, All the Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's heading to San Diego for some favorites, old and new. In Ocean Beach, Calif., Guy's hittin' up a legendary surfer spot for some righteous burgers with an old buddy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for all kinds of meaty favourites. In Louisville, Kentucky, a real-deal Irish pub serves up cottage pie and a lamb-cabbage specialty. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky spot puts out flavourful Asian-barbecue fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: American Classics
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches out some classic joints including a 60-year-old diner in South Beach, a drive-in and the oldest restaurant in Memphis and a classic southern tea room from 1918.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Arizona All-Stars
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' Southwest for a flavor-filled tour of Scottsdale, Arizona. First, the real deal Italian market making an authentic beef specialty straight from the mother country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Buns and Bagels
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns and bagels. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, an amped up deli serves lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into the heart of Central America in search of a man-sized killer. The creature is said to leap into boats, causing fatal injuries when it knocks fishermen unconscious and smashes their bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest to battle an ancient river monster said to rise from the murky depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Flesh-Eating Beasts of Oceania
programme.desc: On the continent of Oceania, Jeremy Wade has heard rumors of two aquatic beasts ruthlessly claiming the lives of both human and animal. To capture these flesh-eating monsters, he disguises himself as their next meal for an up-close encounter.

programme.title: River Monsters: Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy hopes to reel in a rare river monster that's become legendary.

programme.title: River Monsters: American Killers
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade normally travels into the most remote regions searching for freshwater monsters, but recently he's been getting reports of killers from an unexpected location, America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to discover the true river monster of South America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Electric Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Brazil's wild west in search of a river monster that has killed three cowboys. Jeremy finally corners his elusive prey in the most unexpected place. All he has to do then is catch it, without getting killed.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppies: Growing Up Fluffy
programme.desc: Catch up with the Dachshund, Portuguese Water Dog and Rhodesian Ridgeback litters a year after they were first introduced. Find out what happened after they left the nest.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Little Lion Pups
programme.desc: A bullmastiff puppy sticks to his aunt's side as he tries to follow in her footsteps and become a guard dog. A pair of lowchen pups seek out additional family members. An old English sheepdog finds himself being herded by his tiny sister.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Tubby Puppies
programme.desc: Dexter, a Bulldog who has aspirations to rise above his lazy siblings attempts to prove himself on the agility course. Then, a pack of pups who were rescued from the city streets find themselves in a barnyard full of strange beasts.

programme.title: Furever Home Family: Philadelphia, PA
programme.desc: The largest canine adoption event in the country is happening in Philadelphia, and the Amos family has been asked to lend a hand. Their mission: wash the shelter dogs and help get them all adopted to their "furever" home.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Sea Otter Summer Camp
programme.desc: The team is determined to have Gibson the sea otter pup discover his independence as he separates from his pal, Mara. The African penguins head off-site for spring cleaning, and Thor the moray eel proves he's the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Maggie the Magnificent
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to monitor beluga whale activity. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's training kicks in when receiving a shot, and Morty the sea star undergoes a checkup after suspicious growths form.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: After eating all his tank mate’s food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home at the aquarium, and Scarlett the lovable sea lion turns two.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Momma's Surprise
programme.desc: A sea lion called Finn has tummy trouble and the team feeds him a snack that will help them investigate why. Big Mama the guitarfish may be living up to her name, and the boa-duo Ripley and Ridley receive a new home.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ghost Gators
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection, and divers must swim with Taroko the whale shark to get a blood sample.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens
programme.desc: A trio of new penguin chicks are introduced to the pool for their first swim. Family dynamics change when the mandrill monkey troop welcomes a new baby. Plus, a pair of king vultures are prepped for their big debut at the Queens Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat
programme.desc: A markhor goat gives birth to Andre, the biggest baby of the year. A baby bat requires human care before it can be reintroduced to its colony. Later, confiscated lizards destined for the pet trade require urgent medical attention.

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: Martin: I Don't Have the Heart
programme.desc: Pam starts dating an older, wealthy man who eventually asks her to marry him.

programme.title: Movie: Jumping the Broom
programme.desc: Two very different families spend the weekend on Martha's Vineyard for a wedding.

programme.title: Movie: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: A bounty hunter and the con man he's pursuing stumble upon a multi-million dollar stash of diamonds. They are forced to team up in order to catch the criminal responsible.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's the Oval: The Godfather
programme.desc: Kyle orchestrates a high-powered cover up.

programme.title: American Soul: Low Rider

programme.title: Martin: Crunchy Drawers
programme.desc: Martin has a dream in which he's attracted to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: No Love Lost
programme.desc: A fight between Martin and Gina before their engagement party threatens the evening.

programme.title: Martin: The Hoe Down in Motown

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Nice Lady
programme.desc: Will tries to prove that he's a responsible person so he can take the car to Nevada.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: One of Vivian's college students' grades start to slide when she starts dating Will.

programme.desc: While auditioning for a TV show, Martin learns that he needs an audition tape. Although the tape doesn't turn out as planned, Martin is offered a job he can't refuse.

programme.desc: Martin tries to spend more time with Gina to help their relationship, but Gina is busy.

programme.desc: Recent lottery winners are given the opportunity to start a new life together by getting married and buying their dream home in Las Vegas with their $1.6-million winnings.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume One
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Two
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Three
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Four
programme.desc: In this instalment of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we visit the deepest, darkest, haunted spots our country has to offer. We explore a bar in Chicago that contains forces so dark it causes visitors to turn horribly violent.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Five
programme.desc: In this hour of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we're touring more of the spookiest spots in the country! We visit a defunct amusement park that delivers a unique 'thrill', and a residence so haunted the owner rarely sleeps there!

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Six
programme.desc: In this hour, continue the search for places that'll make you scream. Stop by an old prison where ghosts of the country's worst violent offenders roam, and a Chicago home that inspired the legend of the Devil Baby.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Seven
programme.desc: Visit an Illinois cemetery and a theater in Cincinnati that was built over a mass grave.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips
programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns
programme.desc: From a Vermont bridge where a jilted teenage girl leaped to her death, to a Tennessee intersection that was a the site of a deadly shoot out, we venture into towns across America haunted by the transgressions of the past.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Altman and Flagg's Co-List
programme.desc: Sworn enemies Altman and Flagg team up and hit the road in hopes of landing a major listing in La Jolla. Tracy gets creative to sell a Hollywood Hills artists enclave. James and David hit the hiking trails of LA to garner interest in a historic bungalow.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Rock and a Hard Price
programme.desc: Altman hosts a rocking open house for a Trousdale party pad that once belonged to Howard Hughes. Flagg struggles to find the perfect family house for a very particular buyer, who questions if Flagg is the right fit for her.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moms Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: When Todd refuses to celebrate anyone but Faye for Mother's Day, Julie and Lindsie make their own plans. Todd is forced to babysit Jackson but struggles with Lindsie's new age parenting.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: When Todd offers to be a chauffeur for Faye and her sister Francis, he gets more than he bargained for. Meanwhile, Julie opens a boutique real estate office, but things go awry when she offers to sell Savannah's house.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Prank Master
programme.desc: When Savannah decides to drop out of college Todd hatches a plan to get her back in class. Meanwhile Nanny Faye works overtime to pull an epic prank on Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Remission Control
programme.desc: The Chrisley's take it to the gutter with a family bowling tournament. And while Julie waits to hear if her cancer is in remission, the family plans a surprise for her.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Differing Strokes
programme.desc: Todd and Chase team up for a not so friendly golf match against Jay Demarcus. And Savannah attempts to move in with Nanny Faye only to discover there's no room at the inn!

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Animal House
programme.desc: Todd gets more than he bargained for when he offers to watch a house full of children. And Julie struggles to let her hair down on a girls' weekend.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Tantrums and Tiaras
programme.desc: Grayson's dream to visit Universal Orlando's Volcano Bay is in jeopardy when his parents work gets in the way.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Quit Your Pitchin'
programme.desc: Todd attempts to train Savannah for a charity softball game despite not knowing how to play himself. When Todd neglects to help Grayson train his new puppy he gets on Julie's bad side.

programme.title: Botched: Boob-Watch
programme.desc: Former 'Baywatch' star Nicole Eggert wants smaller breasts after her last surgeon gave her implants that were too big. Terry tries to reconstruct a woman with flesh eating disease.

programme.title: Botched: Breast Greedy
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif performs a rhinoplasty on a woman who had her first nose job at 12 years old. Dr. Dubrow works on a patient who wants to retire her Baywatch boobs and the doctors are left speechless by a patient who can only be described as 'unique.'

programme.title: Botched: Say Yes to the Breasts
programme.desc: Former actress Heather fought a flesh-eating disease that left her with no breasts. Dr. Dubrow helps a spiritual woman who has a butt on her belly and Dr. Nassif helps a man whose doctor left a thumbprint on his nose.

programme.title: Summer House: Firework Starter
programme.desc: Fireworks continue as the 4th of July party winds down. Danielle gets a taste of Jordan, but after their tryst, he sets his eyes on Paige. Lindsay reconnects with Everett. Kyle and Amanda work together on their new start-up.

programme.title: Summer House: Red, White and Ewwww
programme.desc: The annual Fourth of July party is usually a high point of summer for Kyle and his trusty mullet wig, but things are so rocky with Amanda, the only love he might get is from Carl. Lindsay gives Hannah's friend Armand the third degree.

programme.title: Below Deck: Smashton
programme.desc: Florida State University-alumni charter guests arrive single and more than ready to mingle with the crew. Meanwhile, Simone is out of her element working on service and becomes distracted by her new crush. Kevin undermines Kate following a complaint.

programme.title: Below Deck: A Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: The new deckhand arrives just in time as Brian's injured knee worsens. Ashton tries to ingratiate the new teammate with the deck crew, but his efforts are wasted after an explosive crew night out. Kate and Kevin battle over the control of meal service.

programme.title: Below Deck: 12 Seconds in Heaven
programme.desc: Rhylee jeopardizes her job and relationships with the crew after a dramatic first night out. Tanner gossips about his relationship with Simone as things heat up between them. Still sidelined by his leg injury, Brian gets sent to the hospital.

programme.title: Below Deck: Everyone Hates Kate
programme.desc: The crew bonds over a trip to an elephant sanctuary, but Kate's attitude pushes the others to the brink. A day off at the beach club has Courtney protective over Brian. Simone learns Tanner has been gossiping about their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Sorry You Feel That Way
programme.desc: Tanner gives Simone mixed signals by telling her that he just wants to keep things casual, while Ashton tries to squash his beef with Kate after their heated argument the night before. Kate promotes Courtney to second stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Yacht-pocalypse Now
programme.desc: The crew tries to redeem themselves with returning charter guests after Ashton cancels a beach picnic which throws the entire boat into complete chaos. Rhylee and Ashton continue to butt heads while Tanner and Simone contemplate their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Exodus
programme.desc: The crew including Captain Lee are shocked to wake up and hear the shocking news that Kate quit. In Kate's absence, Simone and Courtney struggle to maintain order in the interior. Ashton doesn't remember his actions from the night before.

programme.title: Below Deck: Witch Hunt
programme.desc: Kevin spirals out in response to charter guest, and professional chef, Justine telling him to 'step it up.' Much to Ashton's dismay, Kate returns and interferes in the deck team's drama. Simone sets out to become a better Second Stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Public Displays of Affection
programme.desc: Alexis Bellino and her new beau come aboard the Valor to celebrate her recent divorce. After the deck team deals with major issues, Lee comes to a decision about Rhylee's future, forcing Ashton to change his management style.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Scorpion Queen
programme.desc: Tanner and Kate's flirtations become more obvious to the crew which leads Simone to lose all respect for the two when she finds out they've already kissed. Pulling up to the marina, Kate sees the first yacht she ever worked on as a stewardess.

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Penis Cake!
programme.desc: Captain Lee calls an all staff meeting to address the previous night's debauchery and gives the crew an ultimatum. Brian refuses to apologize for his behaviour at the night market and tells Courtney he is fed up, causing relationship turmoil.

programme.desc: The Ross kids leave their New York penthouse and return to Camp Kikiwaka for the summer where they find, to their surprise, an unexpected camp addition and the Woodchuck cabin's new startling counselor.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Dance in My Pants
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka hosts its annual dance which has Tiffany and Zuri hopeful that they'll dance with a cute boy. Emma learns that Lou and Xander have a history.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Zuri Had a Little Lamb
programme.desc: Lou assigns Zuri and Emma to barn duty. Meanwhile, the boys discover that Gladys has been hiding a secret in the woods.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Zuri Weasels Out
programme.desc: To Zuri's dismay, Hazel makes her a CIT in the Weasel cabin. Jorge and Griff convince Ravi that the camp's horse has a hidden talent.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Luke Out Below
programme.desc: Luke returns to camp and decides to take Griff and Zuri on an adventure to prove that he can be just as responsible as the other CITs.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Queen of Screams
programme.desc: Jorge enters a short story contest and wins a dinner with his favorite horror novelist, Stephanie Queen, and decides to bring along a few of his fellow campers for the thrilling experience. Meanwhile, Xander must act as referee between Emma and Ravi.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Tidal Wave
programme.desc: Zuri helps Xander create a music video for his song 'Tidal Wave' in the hopes of turning him into a social media star.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: Zuri, Jorge and Tiffany enlist the support of an unexpected camper to help restore an abandoned tree house they found as their new hangout. Meanwhile, Emma and Lou, Ravi and Xander get competitive during a friendly game of billiards.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Mother May I?
programme.desc: Lou is in awe when her hero, the legendary Christina Ross, pays a visit to Camp Kikiwaka.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Fog'd In
programme.desc: A strange, toxic fog overtakes Camp Kikiwaka causing the campers to develop bizarrely altered personalities and it’s up to the camp counselors to save the day.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Dog Days of Summer
programme.desc: When Lou decides to leave Camp Kikiwaka after she learns about the passing of her dog, the campers get together to help her realize how much she means to them.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Bad Dog!
programme.desc: Emma, Tiffany and Zuri are not happy when Lou's new puppy, Chuck, wreaks havoc on the Woodchuck cabin.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Mud Fight
programme.desc: After disobeying Ravi's wishes when on a hike, Zuri, Tiffany and Jorge get into a muddy situation. Meanwhile, Lou finds herself smitten and imagines what her life would be like in 1916 with her crush.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Murphy challenges the kids to cook the camp dinner, Zuri orchestrates a heated competition between the counselors and the CITs.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Snapped: The Case Continues: Jodi Arias
programme.desc: With Jodi Arias back in the headlines in 2019, we take another look into the media circus surrounding Jodi's sensational trial and question whether that frenzy, along with other claims, could possibly play a part in a new trial for Arias.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: An in depth look at the life and crimes of master manipulator, and monster, Drew Peterson. Peterson is currently serving time for the murder of his third wife while the search for his fourth wife Stacy continues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Evil Was Waiting
programme.desc: Vince Goslyn found his calling in the military. His career was thriving and he had built a beautiful family. Then one night, the father of five was gunned down. Did his decision to help someone in need cost him his life or was he targeted?

programme.title: Green River Killer
programme.desc: In one of the largest and longest manhunts in the U.S., authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer. But now it's a cat and mouse game, as they try to get inside his mind, so he'll lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: A killer escapes his past and finds a new hunting ground in a city of dreamers. In 2019, after a decade long hunt across four police departments, Michael Gargiulo, now known as The Hollywood Ripper, faces trial for brutally murdering 3 young women.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Evil Was Waiting
programme.desc: Vince Goslyn found his calling in the military. His career was thriving and he had built a beautiful family. Then one night, the father of five was gunned down. Did his decision to help someone in need cost him his life or was he targeted?

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Chris Watts
programme.desc: Break down the psychological aspects of the interrogation room.

programme.title: Snapped: Robyn Davis
programme.desc: Best friends band together after a husband's death, but are they sharing a deadly secret?

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Bryan
programme.desc: A suspicious shooting reveals a pretty real estate agent’s scandalous secret life.

programme.title: Snapped: Kalila Taylor
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a homecoming queen shocks a NY town.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Natalee Holloway: The Burial Site
programme.desc: TJ races to the location that the co-conspirator claims is where he dug up Natalee's remains in 2010. Working with the Aruban authorities, they search for DNA that could lead to convicting those involved in Natalee's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Natalee Holloway: The Bones
programme.desc: After two years following this lead, the investigators finally have evidence in hand that could answer the 12 year old mystery of what happened to Natalee Holloway.

programme.title: Dahmer on Dahmer: A Serial Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Dive into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Jeffrey Dahmer. With new revelations and never-before-seen interviews, the series sheds light on the grizzly and complicated investigation through the eyes of pivotal figures in the case.

programme.title: Dannemora Prison Break
programme.desc: In 2015 two murderers charmed a prison seamstress and broke out of a fortress thought to be impenetrable. Explore the woman at the center of the story and if she was a willing accomplice or an easy mark.

programme.title: A Love to Kill For: Gypsy Rose & Nick
Aaron Hernandez Uncovered
programme.desc: A detailed look at Aaron Hernandez's life, a millionaire athlete with a fiancé and baby, shockingly convicted of murder.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered
programme.desc: Aaron's fiancée and close friends discuss the struggle to accept Aaron's new reality behind bars. Through the murder trial of Odin Lloyd, sisters are torn apart and a conviction seals Aaron's fate. Finally Aaron's darkest secret is revealed.

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh
programme.desc: Marge becomes Director of Springfield's local theater, armed with Lisa's script resembling 'Hamilton.' Meanwhile, Homer joins a baby class with Maggie, where he takes a liking to supervisor Chloe.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Love Lisa
programme.desc: Lisa gives Ralph Wiggum a Valentine's Day card, and Ralph assumes that she's in love with him. Lisa tries to let him down nicely, but Ralph won't get the hint until she yells at him in front of a live studio audience at the Krusty the Clown special.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Streetcar Named Marge
programme.desc: Homer disapproves as Marge is cast in the role of Blanche DuBois in 'Oh! Streetcar,' the musical version of 'A Streetcar Named Desire.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: After getting into an argument, Marge takes Lisa on a touristy trip to Capital City, where, after attending a musical, they meet the show's star, Andrew Rannells, who reminds Lisa how lucky she is to have such a great mom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Springfield Splendor
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa turn Lisa's sad experience into a successful graphic novel-turned-Broadway show, but they struggle with creative differences and ego.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fears of a Clown
programme.desc: Bart goes to prankster rehab after a clown-mask prank terrifies the town and destroys Krusty's career. A tortured Krusty then tries his hand at serious drama with a regional theater company.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Burns' Fleeing Circus
programme.desc: When Springfield is burned to the ground, the Simpsons beg Mr. Burns to fund its rebuilding. Burns agrees with one condition: he gets to put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer of Seville
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires Homer to sing the lead in his production of 'La Bohème.' Homer wows the crowd and escapes a mob of crazed fans with the help of a mysterious woman who seems a little too concerned with Homer's well being.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Smoke on the Daughter
programme.desc: Lisa becomes addicted to second-hand smoke when she believes it is responsible for her improved ballet performance. Meanwhile, when a family of raccoons makes off with Homer's beef jerky, he decides to confront the animals.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Tap Dance in Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa's dance teacher, a former actress, steers her towards tap instead of tango dancing.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: P.T.A It Ain't So
programme.desc: Linda attempts to become more involved with the P.T.A., inspired by its seemingly perfect president, Joanne. Meanwhile, Bob tries to cheer up a hardware store owner after unknowingly making a joke about his pet parrot that recently flew away.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Yes Without My Zeke
programme.desc: When Zeke gets in trouble, the Belcher kids and Jimmy Jr. pitch in to help prevent him being sent to a disciplinary school. However, Tina tries to thwart their mission, so she can have Jimmy Jr. and his butt all to herself.

programme.title: Family Guy: Hefty Shades of Gray
programme.desc: After Peter's hair turns white from a ghost-hunting adventure in his house with the guys, his new look grabs the attention of local news anchor Tom Tucker. Under Tucker's guidance, he learns the ways of reporting fake news.

programme.title: Family Guy: Trump Guy
programme.desc: The Griffins move to Washington D.C. where Peter is hired as the new White House Press Secretary.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Palace Intrigue: Part I
programme.desc: Archer and the rest of the ISIS gang are the guests of Gustavo Calderon and his wife Juliana. Calderon is a big fan of Cherlene, but Juliana is a bigger fan of Archer.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Palace Intrigue: Part II
programme.desc: Archer tries to keep his fling with the dictator's wife a secret while Krieger bonds with his clone brothers.

programme.title: Movie: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: A farmer has a long running feud with a rebellious rabbit named Peter who's determined to have free access to the man's delicious vegetable patch, but their feud reaches new heights when they both take a liking to an animal lover who lives nearby.

programme.title: Movie: Home
programme.desc: A banished member of an alien race that has taken over earth crosses paths with a resourceful teenage girl who has managed to avoid capture. The two form an unlikely alliance as they set off on a series of adventures.

programme.title: Movie: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: With a villainous octopus bent on taking over the world, four espionage penguins join up with an elite task force dedicated to helping animals who can't help themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Raised from a calf by a young girl, Ferdinand is a massive bull whose physical size is rivalled only by the size of his heart. When the bovine is mistakenly thought to be an aggressive beast, he's captured and forced to fight against his will.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Homeward
programme.desc: Worf's foster brother violates the Prime Directive in order to save a doomed alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Sub Rosa
programme.desc: Beverly falls under the spell of a ghost lover who has been in her family for years.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Lower Decks
programme.desc: Four junior officers find themselves involved in a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: An old enemy seeks revenge against the captain and crew of a starship.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
programme.desc: After Spock's death, Captain Kirk learns that Spock's spirit is trapped in Leonard McCoy's mind, so he steals the Enterprise and embarks on a mission to return Spock's body to Vulcan. Along the way, Kirk and the crew must battle Kruge and the Klingons.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: An old enemy seeks revenge against the captain and crew of a starship.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
programme.desc: After Spock's death, Captain Kirk learns that Spock's spirit is trapped in Leonard McCoy's mind, so he steals the Enterprise and embarks on a mission to return Spock's body to Vulcan. Along the way, Kirk and the crew must battle Kruge and the Klingons.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands: New England
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible colour change on Earth, when the greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn. See how this vibrant fiesta is created by the battles between the trees and the forests' inhabitations.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: To survive winter in Alaska, its residents brave life-threatening challenges every day.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Best-Laid Plans
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, Alaskans must endure the brutal elements with no end in sight.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: New Horizons
programme.desc: Alaskans must dig deep to harvest new resources in order to endure dark winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ahead of the Game
programme.desc: In brutal conditions, Alaskans must endure severe circumstances to live off the land.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Arctic Discipline
programme.desc: Alaskans must save themselves, and each other, to endure the harsh winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ultimate Sacrifice
programme.desc: In the face of winter’s adversity, Alaskans must make difficult decisions to survive.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Winter Inferno
programme.desc: The Arctic is melting at a rapid rate, and residents of Alaska must scramble to adapt.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Winter's End
programme.desc: The end of winter season is quickly approaching, and for Chip and Agnes Hailstone this means that they have one last chance to harvest fat caribou until late summer.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Blood
programme.desc: Alaskans work to gather newly available resources with the spring season underway.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Shock & Awe
programme.desc: Alaskans must seize the endless summer daylight to secure needed resources and repair vital equipment before the freeze returns.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Domino Effect
programme.desc: Alaskans must maximize the 22-hour days to improve their homesteads before the frozen darkness returns.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Bear Scare
programme.desc: To survive in the Arctic, Alaskans must respect and honor the land and its inhabitants.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: New Country
programme.desc: As summer continues in the Arctic, Alaskans work to stockpile resources, and explore remote terrain.
