programme.desc: Discover how eyeglass lenses, granite, potato chips and microprocessors are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Automotive Fuel Pumps, Cricket Bats, Change Machines, Iron Pipe
programme.desc: Find out how automotive fuel pumps, cricket bats and change machines are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Composite Propane Cylinders, Salsa, Water-Pumping Windmills, Dragsters
programme.desc: Find out how composite propane cylinders, salsa, water-pumping windmills and dragsters are manufactured.

programme.title: How It's Made: Super Airplane
programme.desc: Airplane landing gear is expertly crafted to safely land aircrafts, and the process to make them requires the latest technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: How It's Made: World's Toughest Car
programme.desc: Armored vehicles are reinforced with bulletproof glass to keep the cars secure, and the process to make them requires the latest technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Open Source Money: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: Meet Joe Roets and Disney Incubated Dragonchain, an American Blockchain company. Joe and the team conduct an ICO to fund their company and find resistance from the US Government. This Revolution is about all the money in the world.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Coal Mine
programme.desc: A rusting industrial complex deep in the woods was once a cornerstone of American business empire, but today, it sits deserted; experts reveal the secrets of this prosperous town's ruin.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen Innocence
programme.desc: On a chilly winter morning in St. Louis, an eleven year old girl vanishes. Days later her body is found along an icy river bank. She's been brutally murdered. It's a race against time for investigators who fear the elusive killer will strike again.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A woman's body is found burned to death in a burning car. As the smoke settles, police arrive and find an abandoned car seat in the back seat. Investigators are frantic to find the child and fear a vicious killer lurks in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Face of My Torturer
programme.desc: William Knorr's mother, Theresa, always threatened that if she ever went to jail for what she had done, she would take him down with her. After years spent helping her keep the horrors secret, could he ever escape or would he wind up like all the others?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secret
programme.desc: Danyall White tells the gripping true story of her brother Richard. Danyall always thought he was a prankster who told stories. But when his stories started getting more and more violent, she slowly realized that her brother was hiding a monstrous secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Blood Atonement
programme.desc: Estephania LeBaron was raised to believe that her father and brothers were holy men, and that the terrible things they did in God's name were just. But she questions everything when faced with having to do the same terrible things herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Not My Boy
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller never suspected that the man terrorizing their city could be a member of their own family. As it dawns on them that their son is hiding a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: What Happened on July 4th?
programme.desc: After beginning a mysterious relationship with a new boyfriend, 14-year-old Ashley Summers disappears from a family 4th of July barbecue.

programme.title: Gone on the 4th of July
programme.desc: When an 18-year-old vanishes from a motel over the 4th of July holiday weekend after a fight with her boyfriend, her family and friends are bewildered by clues left behind in the room.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Girl Gone
programme.desc: A high school freshman disappears. As hours turn to days, her family and town residents wonder if a killer is in the midst.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Wishing Well Mystery
programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Death Before Marriage
programme.desc: Carol has been waiting 25 years to marry the love of her life, Jack Parkes. Six weeks away from their wedding in Kennedy Township, PA, she finds him shot in the head in their living room. The murder will destroy her life and uncover dark family secrets.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: Military UFO Encounters
programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters
programme.desc: Uncovering new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials and influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Raps
programme.desc: Raymond Ross skips town after beating a teen into a coma. With his cousin, who is also wanted, Ross enters the drug scene selling dope and his own music. After a close call, Ross decides to let loose and party hard while police close in on this trail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught Via Email
programme.desc: When Edward Roberson and two fellow inmates went to the showers, they didn't come back. Breaking out, the three scaled the fences and made a run for it. Roberson has escaped and now has stolen guns, in a stolen car running for his life.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make You a Superstar
programme.desc: A scam artist conned aspiring artists out of millions. A modern day Bonnie and Clyde eluded police until a slip-up led to their doorstep.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.desc: Steve and Stacie just moved to St. Pete Beach, Florida, and are looking to put down some roots. They find their perfect beachside home but it needs a ton of work.

programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach retreat in Chesapeake Beach, Maryland, where they can escape the daily hustle and bustle and relax with their six-year-old son.

programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Condemned Cottage
programme.desc: An over-ambitious couple bit off more than they could chew with their cottage fixer-upper. With plants growing out of the foundation and peeled paint on the siding, it's up to Chris and Sara to save this uninhabitable eyesore.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Bling by the Bay
programme.desc: A Florida family recruits the kings to design a sleek, modern pool for their oceanfront home on Tampa Bay. The crew creates an over-the-top pool with a vanishing edge spa and a roman soaking tub that's adorned with LED lighting and fire bowls.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kinds design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Carnivorous: Beef, Pork and Chicken, Oh My!
programme.desc: Courtney Rada heads to Lockhart, Texas, for a giant beef rib that ruins her life in the best way possible. Next, she's off to Oakland, California for a porchetta sandwich from a local mobile meat rotisserie.

programme.title: Carnivorous: Cheesesteak Showdown
programme.desc: Courtney throws down with some lamb shoulder over an open fire in Washington, D.C. and participates in a cheesesteak showdown in Philadelphia. Later, she meets up with Michael Symon for a kielbasa sandwich in Cleveland, Ohio.

programme.title: Carnivorous: Meaty Classics With a Twist
programme.desc: Courtney gets her hands on some hot chicken and French toast in Nashville and a duck fat hot dog in Chicago. Next, she scores a surf-and-turf po' boy sandwich from a classic neighbourhood hangout in New Orleans.

programme.title: Carnivorous: Meat on a Doughnut
programme.desc: Courtney tracks down a high-brow, $1,000 sandwich in Long Island, New York, before going the other direction with hearty meatloaf on a doughnut in Austin, Texas. In Chicago, she finds a classic sausage sandwich at an iconic location.

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters: Part One
programme.desc: The first four Grill Masters are ready for a showdown in the Chopped Kitchen.

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters: Part Two
programme.desc: Four new master grillers step up to the challenge, which includes taffy and blue prawns.

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters: Part Four
programme.desc: The four grill masters contend with something called speculoos in the first basket, and pork butt in the entree round.

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters: Finale
programme.desc: The champions of the first four Chopped Grill Masters competitions return to compete for $50,000. The fierce fight to the finish begins with an appetizer basket of sardines and canned Sloppy Joe filling.

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters: Part Three

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters: Part Four
programme.desc: The four grill masters contend with something called speculoos in the first basket, and pork butt in the entree round.

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters: Finale
programme.desc: The champions of the first four Chopped Grill Masters competitions return to compete for $50,000. The fierce fight to the finish begins with an appetizer basket of sardines and canned Sloppy Joe filling.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Comfort Foods
programme.desc: Explore the most unique restaurants in New York City that serve up their own twist on comfort food staples, including a meatball joint, chicken and waffles, and an eco-friendly hot dog stand.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Meats
programme.desc: Find out why the burger at Minetta Tavern is the most talked about burger in town.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Desserts
programme.desc: Visit a pie shop in Brooklyn where pies are sold by the slice and are sold out in minutes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Gastropubs
programme.desc: Meet the chef who brought the tradition of gastropubs over from England and experience her nose-to-tail cooking.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hand-Held Eats
programme.desc: The meals are hand-held at these popular hotspots, but the unique flavors are the main attraction. Authentic Mexican cuisine pioneer Rick Bayless celebrates Mexico's most beloved street food and delicious snacks.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Adventure
programme.desc: We take you on a gastro-tour of some of the most adventurous efforts in dining today.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seafood Sampler
programme.desc: Noah Cappe dives into the fairground for some of the yummiest seafood snacks on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: This is an episode stuffed with foods that are stuffed. From spicy southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry stuffed dessert, Noah will indulge in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tacos Del Carnival
programme.desc: Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite. Join Noah as he eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos. From a fresh succulent Soft Shell Crab Taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies On The Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Noah's Favs
programme.desc: Noah shares the greatest hits by taking a trip down the memory midway of his favourite carnival foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tons of Taters
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations
programme.desc: Noah follows smoke signals to the fairground. He chows down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pizza Party
programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beach Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe goes surfside for a coastal fairground adventure. He'll sample creative beach eats from midway vendors all around the country.

programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram have their hearts set on revealing the top 10 musical numbers, but soon find out that Kelly Osbourne has been brought in to fill the role. Unwilling to play second, Doofenshmirtz plans to thwart Kelly.

programme.title: The Timeline: A Tale of Two Cities
programme.desc: Having each reached the pinnacle of football glory, the Cowboys and 49ers go on to become the greatest NFL rivalry of the Super Bowl era.

programme.title: The Timeline: Favre Returns
programme.desc: Once universally loved by the NFL's smallest town, Brett Favre was roundly booed when he entered Lambeau wearing the rival Minnesota Vikings' purple and gold. Favre has not been back since. Until now.

programme.title: NFL Total Access
programme.desc: The signature show of the NFL Network provides year-round, never-before-seen footage, news reports, exclusive interviews and inside access to the biggest names in the NFL.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Helmet Catch
programme.desc: Look back at David Tyree's incredible catch in Super Bowl XLII that played a key part in the New York Giants' win and ended New England's perfect season.

programme.title: The Timeline: 0-26 Bucs
programme.desc: The story of the ultimate long shots, the 1976-77 Tampa Bay Buccaneers and their inspired march to a first win that became as satisfying as any the league has ever seen.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Tuck Rule
programme.desc: The story behind the controversial play call that secured a playoff victory for the Patriots in a season that ended with a New England Super Bowl win.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Merger
programme.desc: The story of the unprecedented merger between the National Football League and the upstart American Football League, giving birth to the modern-day NFL and the uniquely American spectacle called the Super Bowl.

programme.title: The Timeline: Last Day in L.A.
programme.desc: Explore the complex history of football in Los Angeles through the lens of Christmas Eve of 1994: the date of the Rams and Raiders final games in Los Angeles on what would be the last day the city saw NFL football until now.

programme.title: The Timeline: 1984: The Season That Saved Football
programme.desc: The moment the NFL's popularity was in deep decline, and the record-breaking season that ended up saving the sport.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Fog Bowl
programme.desc: The unseen story of the game that was barely visible; the 1988 Divisional Playoff where Soldier field found itself buried in a fog bank while broadcasters scrambled to show a game that no one could clearly see.

programme.title: The Timeline: The Greatest Show on Turf
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the St. Louis Rams' record breaking offense that pushed the team to two Super Bowl appearances and a Super Bowl title in three seasons.

programme.title: The Timeline: Peyton Manning's Summer School
programme.desc: An exclusive inside look at Peyton Manning's travels throughout the country in preparation for his incredible 2013 season.

programme.title: The Timeline: There's Only One America's Team
programme.desc: In 1978, NFL Films dubbed the Dallas Cowboys as 'America's Team.' Ever since, no team has become more loved, and possibly more hated.

programme.title: NFL 100 Generations: Offensive Fireworks
programme.desc: Prescott. Kittle. Barkley. In celebration of the NFL's 100th anniversary, three of the game's brightest offensive stars chose legends of the NFL's past to share stories of their most memorable and iconic plays.

programme.title: NFL 100 Generations: Sack Masters
programme.desc: Fletcher Cox, Cam Jordan and Von Miller are paired with the NFL's fiercest pass rush legends to celebrate 100 years of the NFL.

programme.title: NFL 100 Generations: Full Coverage
programme.desc: The no-fly zone will be in effect for this celebration of the NFL's centennial as Jamal Adams, Tyrann Mathieu and Jalen Ramsey sit down with the legendary defensive backs that inspired them. Deion Sanders brings his 'prime time' feel to this episode.

programme.title: NFL 100 Generations: Lone Star Trio
programme.desc: A trifecta of pairings from the lone star state, as Deshaun Watson, DeAndre Hopkins and J.J. Watt share stories with the players that influenced and impacted their games. Brett Favre joins and brings a 'hall of fame' feel to the episode.

programme.desc: Legendary defensive linemen come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Michael Strahan, Randy White, Howie Long, Bruce Smith and Jason Taylor are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Tight Ends

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Wide Receivers
programme.desc: Legendary wide receivers come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Jerry Rice, Michael Irvin, Steve Largent and Steve Smith Sr are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Defensive Backs
programme.desc: Legendary defensive backs come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Deion Sanders, Ronnie Lott, Charles Woodson, Darrell Green, Darrelle Revis and Rod Woodson are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Quarterbacks
programme.desc: Legendary quarterbacks come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Kurt Warner, John Elway, Jim Kelly, Joe Namath, Roger Staubach and Dan Fouts are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Linebackers
programme.desc: Legendary linebackers come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Ray Lewis, Mike Singletary, Harry Carson, Willie Lanier, and Lawrence Taylor are featured.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Lost in America
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives deep into American mysteries by investigating the Lost Colony of Roanoke, searching for Jesse James' loot and looking out for Butch Cassidy's missing money.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Lost in America
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives deep into American mysteries by investigating the Lost Colony of Roanoke, searching for Jesse James' loot and looking out for Butch Cassidy's missing money.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes inside a cutting-edge archaeological investigation that is unearthing brand-new discoveries about Noah's Ark. As experts get closer to finding its final resting place, they reveal the long-lost secrets of this famous vessel.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship

programme.title: Local Knowledge: KW Stone Crabs

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Last Resorts

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps and his team prepare to flip a 20,000-pound carnivore fossil out of the earth and onto a flatbed to get it to the lab for analysis. Meanwhile, Mike Harris hunts for a duckbill skull and Jared Hudson uncovers an ancient reptile.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bridge Painter
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and the Dirty Jobs crew travels to Michigan to work with the Mackinac Bridge Authority on one of the world's largest suspension bridges. Mike goes to great lengths and heights, braving 50 mile per hour winds while helping paint the bridge.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cricket Farmer
programme.desc: Mike heads to Augusta, Georgia to spend the day working on a cricket farm where he helps to breed, capture and package the crickets.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mardi Gras Bladder Banger

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tar Rigger
programme.desc: Mike heads to San Diego to get dirty with the tar rigging crew of the Star of India, the oldest active merchant ship in the world. Then, Mike takes a look back at some of the dirty tools he's used that make civilized life possible for the rest of us.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dirty Chip Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads to the Dirty Potato Chips factory and learns how potato chips are made and what it takes to keep the machines used to make them clean and in working order. Then it's off to Rifle, CO where Mike attempts to clean a "monster" hidden underground.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fish Squeezer

programme.desc: When Bonnie loses her job and struggles to keep her life together, Christy tries to get her back on track.

programme.title: Mom: Belgian Waffles and Bathroom Privileges
programme.desc: Christy has trouble accepting how much easier life is with Bonnie in the house. Meanwhile, Baxter sets up camp in the driveway.

programme.title: Mom: Cotton Candy and Blended Fish
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie go above and beyond to help a sick friend. Meanwhile, Violet is frustrated by the realities of pregnancy.

programme.title: Mom: Corned Beef and Handcuffs
programme.desc: Christy gets stuck in the middle when Bonnie and Chef Rudy start dating.

programme.title: Mom: Hot Soup and Shingles
programme.desc: When Christy gets injured, she refuses to admit she needs Bonnie's help. Meanwhile, Luke turns to Baxter for advice about being a father.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mutiny on the Krusty/ The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers need Krabs to lead them home. Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sand Castles in the Sand/ Shell Shocked
programme.desc: A friendly day of building sand castles soon turns into all out war when SpongeBob and Patrick use their sand creations to battle each other. When Gary's shell breaks, SpongeBob tries to find him a replacement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob Appreciation Day: Patchy's Beach Bash!
programme.desc: A shipwreck survivor washes up on the Bikini Atoll, where Patchy shows him his favorite SpongeBob moments.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Ghoul Fools

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West

programme.title: Mobsters: John Gotti
programme.desc: John Gotti started out as the leader of the Fulton Rockaway Boys a group of young thugs in New York, when he got older he took on the lead of the Gambino Family and in turn became one of the most well-known figures in Mafia history.

programme.title: Mobsters: The Gambinos: First Family of Crime
programme.desc: The Gambino family started out with Carlo who made his way to America to sell counterfeit ration stamps during WWII he had several successors including Paul Castellano and John Gotti.

programme.title: Gotti: Godfather and Son: Kid Christmas
programme.desc: As a student at New York Military Academy, John Gotti Jr. learned of his father's meteoric rise to power in the world of organized crime.

programme.title: Gotti: Godfather and Son: Fathers and Sons/ Sins of the Father
programme.desc: The FBI focused on taking down Gotti and the Gambino Crime family; Gotti Senior was convicted and sent to prison for life. John Junior, having resolved to quit the life of organized crime, confessed to racketeering, served over seven years and is free.

programme.title: Hoarders: Anna/ Claire and Vance
programme.desc: Anna tried to hide her hoarding from her family, but her secret was exposed. Claire and Vance love to collect books, but their house contains an astounding half-million books.

programme.title: Hoarders: Maggie and Ann
programme.desc: Maggie's home is so packed with her shopping addiction that her granddaughter was forced to sleep on top of piles and shower outside with a garden hose.

programme.title: Hoarders: Leza and Linda
programme.desc: Leza's house is so packed, the city has red tagged it as uninhabitable and she is no longer allowed to live in it. If she doesn't clean up before the city imposed deadline, Leza could lose her property and end up homeless.

programme.title: Hoarders: Linda and Kerry
programme.desc: Linda hoarded out a 180-acre historic farm in preparation for the end of times and is facing the potential loss of her property to city authorities if she can't clean up. Kerry started hoarding plants after he lost his job as a military medic.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 100%, Every Time
programme.desc: Randy and Justin chase down a suspected car thief, while both EMT teams respond to emergency calls involving children in distress.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Mardi Gras
programme.desc: It's the week of Mardi Gras and it's the busiest time of year for our first responders. Working the parade route comes with its own challenges and unique cases.

programme.title: Nightwatch: United We Stand
programme.desc: On the fourth of July in New Orleans, the heat seems to trigger havoc in the streets. Holly, Nick and Keeley arrive at a bloody scene where a woman could lose her arm after a bar fight. Then, a first responder is assaulted at the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Guardians of the City
programme.desc: Titus and Dan treat a woman who was viciously stabbed in the face, and Holly and Nick tend to an emotional young transgendered woman who was assaulted. A wild police chase ends with a major car accident.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher

programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.desc: A snobby heiress suffers from amnesia after falling off her yacht and hitting her head. A carpenter takes advantage of the situation by convincing her that she is his wife and the mother of his unruly brood of children.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: House: Locked In
programme.desc: A man named Lee awakens in New York after an accident, unable to move or communicate in any way. House, himself injured in a motorcycle mishap, occupies the hospital bed next to Lee and annoys the doctors treating them both.

programme.title: House: Simple Explanation
programme.desc: Charlotte, an older woman who has spent the last six months taking care of her dying husband Eddie, is rushed to Princeton Plainsboro after collapsing from respiratory failure.

programme.title: House: Saviors
programme.desc: Cameron postpones her vacation with Chase when an environmental radical collapses at a protest with unexplainable symptoms. Meanwhile, House is unsure of Wilson's new healthy diet.

programme.title: House: House Divided
programme.desc: The team takes on the case of a deaf 14-year-old named Seth, who collapsed after hearing explosions while competing in a wrestling match. The team disagrees with his mother's decision to forego cochlear implants, which could supplement Seth's hearing.

programme.title: House: Under My Skin
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of a ballerina whose lungs collapse in the middle of a performance. When the treatment causes her skin to fall off, the dancer faces not only the prospect of never dancing again but also of dying an agonizing death.

programme.title: House: Both Sides Now
programme.desc: House and the team are intrigued by Scott, a man whose left brain and right brain operate independently, leaving him with two distinct personalities and no control over some of his actions. The warring personalities make things difficult to diagnose.

programme.title: House: Broken
programme.desc: House begins a detox program to get the vicodin out of his system in an attempt to control his hallucinations. House plans to leave the facility once he's clean but he is stymied by his attending physician who recommends further treatment.

programme.title: House: Broken
programme.desc: House begins a detox program to get the vicodin out of his system in an attempt to control his hallucinations. House plans to leave the facility once he's clean but he is stymied by his attending physician who recommends further treatment.

programme.title: House: Both Sides Now
programme.desc: House and the team are intrigued by Scott, a man whose left brain and right brain operate independently, leaving him with two distinct personalities and no control over some of his actions. The warring personalities make things difficult to diagnose.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Movie: Overboard
programme.desc: A snobby heiress suffers from amnesia after falling off her yacht and hitting her head. A carpenter takes advantage of the situation by convincing her that she is his wife and the mother of his unruly brood of children.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers and Dogs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits classic burger and hot dog joints including: a Baltimore spot for Coney dogs from an 80 year old recipe; an Austin, TX, eatery known for Serrano peppers and hot buffalo sauce burgers; and a Minneapolis dog and burger dive.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Bites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's living large and going supersize! He's digging in to Cincinnati chili piled up six different ways, burgers stacked to the max from Ann Arbor, Mich., and a behemoth breakfast in Springfield, Ill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Tacos and Dogs
programme.desc: Guy samples great food in Houston, TX and a joint in a grocery store offers wild toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Big Burgers To Little Italy
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from the bomb burgers to a taste of Italy. In Little Rock, Ark., a funky joint pairing their craft brews with all kinds of on-the-bun creations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Food, Small Towns
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's stopping in small towns to dig in to big-time eats. In Raymond, N.H., a blow-your-mind butchery loadin' up their burgers and crankin' out scratch-made corn dogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers 'n More
programme.desc: Guy heads to California to a warehouse-turned-burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Guy's traveling all over the country searching for a taste of the South.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot
programme.desc: Guy hits the surf 'n' turf jackpot in Mississippi and Oahu. He tries some tasty ribs, fritters as well as pork rinds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Swiss, Sandwiches and Sausage
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a standout spot servin' up specialties straight out of Switzerland. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky food truck dishing out grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Bowlful of Soul
programme.desc: In Charlotte, N.C., a down-home hangout dishes out low country favourites, like killer collard greens and standout shrimp and grits. In Las Vegas, a strip mall spot serves up both savoury and sweet crepe specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One Street Wonders
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is heading to Cincinnati to try three righteous restaurants all on the same street. He checks out The Funky Pub where they're serving up all kinds of hot dogs and sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meaty Mashup
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., an old gas station-turned-eatery is pumpin' bison into a burrito and pilin' pork onto cornmeal waffles. In Santa Rosa, CA, a Vietnamese joint makes phenomenal pho and righteous barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sweet, Savory and Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are in for a culinary adventure. In Bakersfield, Calif., the classic cafe dishing out meaty Texas chili and decadent pumpkin pancakes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Little Twisted
programme.desc: Guy sets out to try the unexpected, be it an old fast food joint in New York with secret Italian family recipes or a Japanese grill/ dinner in California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Called It
programme.desc: Guy visits an old diner in Kentucky for fresh bread and Oyster Po' Boy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Request
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a fast food joint in Charlotte, a neighbourhood favourite for grilled cheese sandwiches in Lakewood and a British Pub in Houston serving shepherd's pie made from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Owned
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a Mexican restaurant and tortilla factory in San Diego.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches Plus
programme.desc: Guy travels to find a homemade meatloaf sandwich topped with cranberry compote.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Retro
programme.desc: Guy Fieri rolls out to some legendary joints that will take you back in time: Taylor's Automatic Refresher in St. Helena, California, an original 1940s take-out only burger joint; Byway Café in Portland and a Soda Shot and diner in Goshen, Indiana.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis makes a special -- and portable -- meal for her aunt Carolyna and her husband, Alex, who are parents to new baby Arlo. Giada prepares chicken with chickpea and tomato ragu and a cheesy bacon and hash brown frittata.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Beachside Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is bringing the bold spices and flavors of the tropics to brunch with a beautiful menu that includes spiced oatmeal with bananas, mangoes and toasted coconut almonds, and a jerk chicken sweet potato hash with poached eggs.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Ina Garten showcases incredible desserts, including a decadent chocolate cake with mocha frosting, sophisticated prunes in armagnac and a crazy-delicious salted caramel sundae with peanut-caramel popcorn and rich chocolate sauce.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All-American Boy
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli's close friend and fellow chef, Stuart O'Keeffe, recently became a US citizen, so she's treating him to her favorite all-American dishes. The patriotic menu includes red wine and herb-marinated tri-tip and twice-baked potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Grilling to Go
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's grilling up a well-deserved tailgate lunch. On the menu are smoky salt and pepper drumsticks, flame-grilled cheesy steakburgers, grilled taters with onions and garlic, spicy street corn and blueberry hand pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cousins Campout
programme.desc: Ree's helping out with the food at a big cousins' reunion campout down by the creek, whipping up cheesy bacon hot dogs and campfire quesadillas over the fire. For dessert, she puts together a fun do-it-yourself campfire cone bar full of treats.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Tequila
programme.desc: It's tequila all the way as Ree Drummond tests making a whole meal of an appetizer, main course, dessert and cocktail with a bottle of tequila.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 7
programme.desc: Ree cooks for the 4th of July with store-bought shortcuts and lots of fun with her family crew. She makes party-ready chipotle Caesar salad with grilled salmon, a fabulous cheesy asparagus tart and easy corn dip that's a real crowd pleaser.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Addicted to Chocolate
programme.desc: Molly Yeh shares her favorite choco-licious recipes to curb the cravings. She makes s'mores pie, chocolate sea salt rugelach and mini marzipan treats. Plus, rich and gooey Turkish coffee brownies will be enough to satisfy any chocolate appetite.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bayou Bash Brunch
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites Louisiana native and actress Faith Ford over for a brunch that makes them feel like they're in the Big Easy. Valerie makes green tomato Benedict and easy cajun hollandaise, olive salad, hurricane mimosas and bananas foster.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Family Favs
programme.desc: Join Kardea Brown as she shares some of her favourite recipes pulled straight from her family's recipe box.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Grilled Steak and Potatoes the Symon Way
programme.desc: Michael demonstrates simple techniques for grilling skirt steak to tender, medium-rare perfection. Then, he complements the steak with sticky barbecue onions fired up in a cast-iron skillet and cheesy hash brown potatoes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Family Style: Summertime Faves With a Twist
programme.desc: The hosts share favourite summer recipes with a delicious twist. Jeff makes a boneless riburger and Sunny shares an easy grilled garden state salad. Geoffrey makes his summertime seafood stable fish and chips with spicy tartar sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG's Salute To Summer
programme.desc: To celebrate America and the people who have served it, Guy Fieri invites four chef veterans from different branches of the military to compete in two summer-themed games.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: American Heroes
programme.desc: Four American heroes - a cop, a firefighter, an EMT and an Air Force vet - test their culinary might in a battle worth up to $20,000. First, the heroes are inspired by legendary rapper-turned-judge Rev Run to "wok this way," using a wok to shop.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Fried Feud
programme.desc: It's nothing but fried fun when four chefs are challenged with making dishes full of fried fair food. They will have to follow a bizarre grocery list for the first challenge before getting a skimpy budget to make fried chicken for the next challenge.

programme.title: Backstory: The Decision
programme.desc: In July 2010, ESPN aired 'The Decision,' a live special in which LeBron James, the biggest NBA free agent ever, announced he was leaving Cleveland for Miami. The criticism was massive. Don Van Natta Jr. explores the far-reaching impact.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bad News From the Clinic?
programme.desc: Charlie falls head over heals for a woman who plays hard to get better than he does.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Always Wanted a Shaved Monkey
programme.desc: Evelyn calls Charlie to harass him over not calling her, and Judith bills Alan for an expensive pair of tennis shoes she bought Jake. Charlie and Alan begin to take their frustration out on one another.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Old Hose Bag Is My Mother
programme.desc: Alan goes on a nightmarish blind date in order to repay a debt to his mother.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Squab, Squab, Squab, Squab, Squab
programme.desc: Alan leaves Jake at Evelyn's for a disastrous sleepover and winds up partying with Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Does This Smell Funny to You?
programme.desc: Charlie unknowingly sleeps with an elderly man's hot, young trophy wife.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Carpet Burns and a Bite Mark
programme.desc: Charlie organizes an intervention in order to keep Alan from reuniting with his ex-wife, Judith.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Your Dismissive Attitude Toward Boobs
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan get into a power struggle when Alan allows Berta to stay at Charlie's house for a few days while her brother tries to wean himself off drugs at her place. Berta, who has an ulterior motive, plays one brother against the other.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: We Called It Mr. Pinky
programme.desc: A bout of impotence causes Charlie to re-examine his feelings toward women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something Salted and Twisted
programme.desc: Alan has a family dinner to celebrate the publication of a newspaper article that calls him a 'good doctor, neighbour and guy,' but he's crushed when his mother is not impressed. After drowning his sorrow in many drinks, he has a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan drop Jake off at a friend's house and head out for some sibling bonding at the movies, but their night is ruined when Alan freaks out after convincing himself that Jake was too eager to spend the weekend away from him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Humiliation Is a Visual Medium
programme.desc: No one believes Charlie when he says that his relationship with Mia is getting serious, and everyone really thinks he's lost it when he confesses that they have been dating for more than a month and haven't consummated the relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: And the Plot Moistens
programme.desc: Jake's teacher, Francine, calls Alan and Judith in to discuss Jake's lack of interest in school. Desperate to communicate with someone intelligent while continuing to see his airhead girlfriend, Kandi, Alan starts a platonic relationship with Francine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Once With Aunt Sophie
programme.desc: When a cute girl from Jake's school invites him to a party, Charlie butts in on Alan's milestone moment with his son by offering his own words of wisdom on women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Warning, It's Dirty
programme.desc: Charlie coaches Jake on the art of infidelity while his girlfriend is away for Christmas.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ow, Ow, Don't Stop
programme.desc: Charlie goes on a spending spree for his old fling, Courtney, who shows up after three years in prison for conning him out of money.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Animal Attraction
programme.desc: Doug has to transport live penguins to the zoo and has to cancel an evening with Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: White Collar
programme.desc: When the shift supervisor at work suddenly dies, Doug gets his job and Carrie is thrilled.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Rayney Day
programme.desc: Doug makes plans to hang out with Richie, until Ray Barone suggests a game of golf.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Train Wreck
programme.desc: Doug is disappointed when Carrie isn't jealous of his beautiful new trainee.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Popular
programme.desc: Christine is shocked when a new dad at Ritchie's school calls her a 'meanie mom' for being judgmental and standoffish, and dumps her for Marly and Lindsay.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Traffic
programme.desc: Christine promises to accompany Mr. Harris to an important event but leaves him hanging when Ritchie's soccer game goes into overtime.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Between a Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Christine attempts to get over her break-up with Mr. Harris. Matthew goes to therapy and learns that his intimacy issues are not due to his dysfunctional relationship with his mother.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly lets New Christine set her up on a blind date but is disconcerted when she finds out more about him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: House
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richards and New Christine bought the house she had always dreamed of, she attempts to feel genuinely happy for them.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Burning Down the House
programme.desc: Christine considers taking a walk on the wild side in order to make Barb think she's not a square.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.
